72 E1M E1M_CRYING 21m(E1m)Crying, Tearfulness CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of the patient's crying or tearfulness. -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type
